---
title: "Social Gatherings, Conferences, and Awards"
format:
  html:
    template-partials:
      - partials/title_only/title-block.html
aliases:
  - ../fun/
---

## Social Gatherings

It's not all about research and science - we also like to have other types of fun and will keep a record here of the
social events we did together:

![Poker evening at Mitchell's place on May 13th, 2026](../images/group/social/20260513_Poker_Evening.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Pottery painting on March 13th, 2026](../images/group/social/20260313_Pottery_Painting.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Winter Holiday party at Prof. Peter's place (where we had dinner with Austrian and Indian dishes as well as Lady M tiramisu cake and brownies) on December 7th, 2025](../images/group/social/20251207_Winter_Holiday_Party.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Indoor mini-golf for the second time at Puttshack on November 17th, 2025](../images/group/social/20251117_Indoor_Golf.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Board game evening (Emma and Isaiah were there too but left before the photo was taken) on April 22nd, 2025](../images/group/social/20250422_BoardGames.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Third group lunch on February 5th, 2025](../images/group/social/20250205_Group_Lunch.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![At the end of Fall Semester 2024 we went bowling on December 12th, 2024](../images/group/social/20241212_Bowling.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![End of Spring Semester indoor mini-golf at Puttshack on March 29th, 2024](../images/group/social/20240329_Puttshack.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![End of Fall Semester Escape Game at Boxaroo on December 14th, 2023 - we barely missed making it out on time.... :/](../images/group/social/20231214_D2R2_EscapeGame_Boxaroo.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Second group lunch on November 8th, 2023](../images/group/social/20231108_Group_Lunch.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![First group lunch on September 20th, 2023](../images/group/social/20230920_Group_Lunch.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

## Previous Group Photos

![Second Group Photo, Fall 2024](../images/group/social/group_photo_fall2024.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![First Group Photo, Fall 2023](../images/group/social/group_photo_fall2023.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

## Graduation

![Emma graduated with a Master of Science in Mechanical Engineering on April 28th, 2026](../images/group/social/20260428_Emma_Graduation.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Isaiah gave the graduation speech - watch the video [here](https://youtu.be/a_JJWT_e75k), Summer 2025](../images/group/social/2025_Isaiah_Graduate_Speech.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Karan graduated with a Master of Science in Data Science, Summer 2025](../images/group/social/2025_Karan_Graduation.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Bharath graduated with a Master of Science in Data Analytics Engineering, Summer 2025](../images/group/social/2025_Bharath_Graduation.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

## Awards and Other Recognitions of our Group Members

![Emma's team won first place in the technical track of the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE)'s 2024 Geothermal Collegiate Competition!](../images/group/social/Emma_1st_Place_DOEs_Geothermal_Collegiate_Competition.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Claire getting honored at the AS Academic Honors Convocation 2025 for her NSF GRFP](../images/group/social/20250416_AS_Academic_Honors_Convocation.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Bharath received the *Student Employee Award* in the category *Technology and Innovation* on April 12th, 2024. Big congratulations!](../images/group/social/20240412_Bharath_Award.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

## Conference Attendances and Awards of our Group Members

![Mahdi presented a poster at the CoE PhD Research Expo on June 4th, 2026](../images/group/social/20260604_CoE_PhD_Research_Expo_Mahdi.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Claire and Circe presented a poster at the PAIR launch event on May 21st, 2026](../images/group/social/20260521_PAIR_Launch_Claire_Circe.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Ardavan presented a lightning talk at the MIE Graduate Research Expo (Mahdi also presented a poster there, but I don't have a photo), 2025 in Boston](../images/group/social/20251204_MIE_Graduate_Research_Expo_Ardavan.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Mahdi presented his poster at the MRS Fall Meeting 2025 in Boston](../images/group/social/20251202_MRS_Mahdi.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Ardavan presented his poster at the MRS Fall Meeting 2025 in Boston](../images/group/social/20251202_MRS_Ardavan.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Circe (left) and Claire (right) presenting a poster at RISE 2025 in Boston](../images/group/social/20250411_RISE.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Ardavan presented his poster at the MRS Fall Meeting 2024 in Boston](../images/group/social/20241204_MRS_Ardavan.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

## Talks by Prof. Peter

![Prof. Peter gave an invited talk at the MSE Department Seminar at Boston University on April 10th, 2026](../images/group/social/20260410_MSE_BU_Seminar_Peter.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Prof. Peter gave an invited talk at the ENERGIZE NRT Annual Symposium at Boston University on April 9th, 2026](../images/group/social/20260409_ENERGIZE_NRT_Symposium_Peter.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Prof. Peter gave a talk at TMS 2026 in San Diego on March 16th, 2026](../images/group/social/20260316_TMS2026_Peter.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Prof. Peter gave a talk at the ICACC26 in Daytona](../images/group/social/20260130_ICACC26_Peter.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Prof. Peter gave an invited talk at the MRS Fall Meeting 2025 in Boston](../images/group/social/20251201_MRS_Peter.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Prof. Peter was invited to give a talk at the University of Florida (MAE Department Seminar) in November 2025](../images/group/social/20251113_UF_MAE_Seminar.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Prof. Peter gave a talk about [MatFold](https://github.com/d2r2group/MatFold) at the MRS Fall Meeting 2024 in Boston](../images/group/social/20241212_MRS_Peter.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Prof. Peter was invited to give a talk at the TMS 2024 in Orlando](../images/group/social/20240304_TMS_Peter.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}
